title: sarcostemma bilobum subsp. filipes
intro: Sarcostemma bilobum subsp. filipes, also known as the "Woolly-stemmed Caltrops," is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sarcostemma bilobum subsp. filipes include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to extract its medicinal compounds and provide relief from various ailments.
